Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Continued To Jul-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Co-Executors and the Attorney to appear on July 31, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for close of estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.
